Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.resources

Class StarGroups

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.ui.resources.StarGroups
public class StarGroups extends Object
This class provides access to the list of star groups available to the new-star-from-database dialog, including their persistence across sessions.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    StarGroups()
    Private constructor to ensure Singleton.

  • Constructor Details

    • StarGroups

      public StarGroups()
      Private constructor to ensure Singleton.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static StarGroups getInstance()

    • getGroupNames

      public Set<String> getGroupNames()
      Return an ordered set of star group names.

    • getDefaultStarListTitle

      public String getDefaultStarListTitle()
      Returns:
      the defaultStarListTitle

    • getStarNamesInGroup

      public Set<String> getStarNamesInGroup(String groupName)
      Return an ordered set of star names in the specified group.
      Parameters:
      groupName - The group name.
      Returns:
      An ordered set of stars in the group.

    • getAUID

      public String getAUID(String groupName, String starName)
      Return the AUID for the specified group and star.
      Parameters:
      groupName - The group name.
      starName - The star name.
      Returns:
      The corresponding AUID; may be null.

    • doesGroupExist

      public boolean doesGroupExist(String groupName)
      Does the specified group exist?
      Parameters:
      groupName - The name of the group.
      Returns:
      True if the group exists, false otherwise.

    • doesStarExistInGroup

      public boolean doesStarExistInGroup(String groupName, String starName)
      Does the specified star exist in the specified group?
      Parameters:
      groupName - The name of the group.
      starName - The name of the star.
      Returns:
      True if the star exists in the group, false otherwise.

    • addStarGroup

      public void addStarGroup(String groupName)
      Add a new (empty) star group to the map. If the group previously existed, this will replace it.
      Parameters:
      groupName - The name of the group.

    • removeStarGroup

      public void removeStarGroup(String groupName)
      Remove the named star group, if it exists.
      Parameters:
      groupName - The name of the group.

    • addStar

      public void addStar(String groupName, String starName, String auid)
      Add a star (name and AUID) to the specified group. If the star previously existed in that group, this will replace it.
      Parameters:
      groupName - The name of the group.
      starName - The name of the star.
      auid - The AUID of the star. This is assumed to correspond to a validated (i.e. existing the the database) AUID.

    • removeStar

      public void removeStar(String groupName, String starName)
      Remove a star (name and AUID) from the specified group, if it exists.
      Parameters:
      groupName - The name of the group.
      starName - The name of the star.

    • resetGroupsToDefault

      public void resetGroupsToDefault()
      Remove all groups except the default group.

    • storeStarGroupPrefs

      public void storeStarGroupPrefs()
      Store the star groups as a preferences string value.
